title: gifola numidica
intro: Gifola numidica, also known as Numidian tea tree, is a plant species native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Gifola numidica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, and it can also be used to make a tincture or added to topical creams and ointments for its therapeutic benefits.
